verbatim_text: And the funny thing is, a few months later, actually, a few weeks later, I talked with my wife. She didn't have TAs back then, so we were grading at home. My wife and I are grading. And she was grading her midterm. And she tells me, oh, there's this, can you believe it? In my midterm, the kid who has the highest score very far is a freshman. And I was like, wow. His name is YouSoon. I was like, oh, never heard of him. It wouldn't be in my class. I teach graduate level class. And then, actually, a week later, there's Professor Jeremy, who actually didn't like me very much because I once stole his grad student, you know, his favorite student. And he came to me and was like, you know, Kylian, by the way, I'm still mad that you stole Jake, but I found a new student. He's amazing.
